description_long: This object is a doll head with a highly stylized, semi-realistic face featuring large, expressive green eyes and a small, slightly open mouth with visible lips. The skin tone is pale, and the doll has short, straight, pastel pink hair with blunt bangs that frame the forehead. The head is split vertically, with one half showing the detailed face and hair, while the other half is a solid, dark, matte surface with a zigzag seam running down the center. The facial features are finely painted, with defined eyebrows and subtle shading around the eyes and cheeks. The overall form is smooth and rounded, with small, protruding ears visible on both sides.
description: A doll head with pastel pink hair, large green eyes, and a split design showing one detailed face and one solid dark half.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, mostly solid dark with a zigzag seam and small ears visible.
description_view_1: Right profile view highlighting the smooth, dark half of the head and the detailed facial features on the left side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full face with large green eyes, pink hair, and a small mouth, with the split seam visible down the center.
description_view_3: Left profile view showing the detailed face, pink hair, and the transition to the solid dark half at the seam.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only the head is present.
attribute_pose: Head only, upright and facing forward, with no visible body or limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly parted lips and wide, open eyes; eyebrows are relaxed.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight pastel pink hair with blunt bangs covering the forehead.
